chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-1374 of 2020 (Muhammad Khan Detho Vs. Govt. of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of CMA No. 4721/2021 (Contempt/A) 07-02-2024. Ms. Rizwana Jabeen Siddiqui, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shaharyar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General. ******** In terms of order dated 07-04-2021 passed by this Court, the compliance report has been furnished by the Deputy Director Food Region Shaheed Benazirabad. After going through the same, learned counsel for the petitioner was fair enough to say that for the time being she does not press the listed application for contempt proceedings against the respondents and would initiate further proceedings in accordance with law if need be. Be that as it may, the listed application is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
